description: Develop and maintain mobile applications using Flutter, React Native, Android, and Swift, while collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deliver new features.

Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart. Worked closely with UI/UX designers to deliver responsive, user-friendly interfaces. Published applications on the Google Play Store and Apple App Store, while maintaining app security and performance.
